test.name: TC02 Login User

kw.name: Open Application
Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Maximize Browser Window
kw.msg: Keyword 'Capture Page Screenshot' could not be run on failure: Message: no such window: target window already closed from unknown error: web view not found (Session info: chrome=146.0.7680.177) Stacktrace: chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff721f729c5+2ed785] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff721c9a0d0+14e90] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff7219fdb2d] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff7219d4322] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff721a86e86] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff721aa3482] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff721a49298] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff721a4a183] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff721f9de0d+318bcd] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff721f98588+313348] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff721fb9d7a+334b3a] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff721cb6785+31545] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff721cbfacc+3a88c] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff721ca3634+1e3f4] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff721ca37e6+1e5a6] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff721c87e37+2bf7] KERNEL32!BaseThreadInitThunk [0x7ff98282e8d7+17] ntdll!RtlUserThreadStart [0x7ff9842cc3fc+2c]

kw.name: Close All Browsers
kw.doc: Closes all open browsers and resets the browser cache.

test.doc: check if the user is able to login
test.status: Setup failed: NoSuchWindowException: Message: no such window: target window already closed from unknown error: web view not found (Session info: chrome=146.0.7680.177) Stacktrace: chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff721f729c5+2ed785] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff721c9a0d0+14e90] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff7219fdb2d] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff7219d4322] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff721a86e86] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff721aa3482] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff721a49298] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff721a4a183] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff721f9de0d+318bcd] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff721f98588+313348] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff721fb9d7a+334b3a] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff721cb6785+31545] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff721cbfacc+3a88c] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff721ca3634+1e3f4] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff721ca37e6+1e5a6] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff721c87e37+2bf7] KERNEL32!BaseThreadInitThunk [0x7ff98282e8d7+17] ntdll!RtlUserThreadStart [0x7ff9842cc3fc+2c]
